personal.name: Jeeva Chinnasamy
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building innovative digital experiences with clean code and responsive designs
personal.bio: Hi, I'm Jeeva, a dedicated full-stack web developer driven by a passion for creating innovative digital experiences. With expertise in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and backend technologies, I bring ideas to life through clean code and responsive designs. My projects range from dynamic e-commerce websites to unique interactive applications. I enjoy solving complex problems and turning challenges into opportunities for growth. Always eager to learn and evolve, I aim to deliver impactful and user-friendly solutions.

projects.title: Bus Reservation System
projects.description: A Java-based bus reservation application with booking management, seat selection, and user authentication features.

projects.title: Food E-Commerce
projects.description: A responsive food ordering website with cart functionality, menu browsing, and checkout features.

projects.title: E-Commerce Store
projects.description: A modern e-commerce frontend with product catalog, shopping cart, and responsive design for all devices.

experience.description: Completed intensive Java full-stack development training. Learned modern web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java, and database management.
Building responsive websites and web applications for clients. Focus on creating user-friendly interfaces and clean, maintainable code.
